subject: [PATCH 12/13] mm: install PMD swap entries on swap-out

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch improves the handling of huge page mappings when swapping out memory. When a huge page is swapped out, it was previously split into 512 smaller pages, losing the original mapping and requiring khugepaged to rebuild it later. This patch introduces PMD-level swap entries, which can be used instead of individual PTEs for each slot in the huge page. The patch adds new functions to install and manage these PMD-level swap entries, mirroring the existing PTE swap-out path at PMD granularity. This change reduces overhead and improves performance by preserving the original mapping across the swap round-trip.
